phrases.intent_en: Where is Krone Stube dining room
phrases.cultural_note: Directions in Swiss restaurants often refer to visible areas like the main dining room.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right through the main dining area.

responses.english: To the right through the main dining area.

phrases.intent_en: How do I settle bill at counter
phrases.text_local: Wo bezahle ich an der Theke?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment at counters is common in Swiss establishments; staff may direct to the main or side counter.

likely_response.local: An der Theke, hier oder drüben.
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter, here or over there.

responses.english: At the counter, here or over there.
responses.local: An der Theke, hier oder drüben.

phrases.text_local: Ist der Biergarten heute Abend offen?
phrases.cultural_note: Evening hours are commonly stated in hours past noon in German-speaking regions.
